description_long: This object is a soldering station, consisting of a rectangular black base unit with a metallic holder for a soldering iron, a coiled metal stand, and a cleaning sponge area. The base features a rotary temperature control knob, a power switch, and indicator lights, as well as two distinct cleaning pads—one brass wool and one sponge. The soldering iron is attached to the base by a flexible, insulated cable and rests securely in the coiled metal holder. The front panel is labeled with 'Soldering Station' and includes CE certification marks, suggesting compliance with safety standards. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for use on a workbench or desktop in urban workshops, garages, or repair shops.
description: A compact soldering station with a black base, metallic iron holder, rotary control knob, and cleaning pads, designed for desktop use in workshops or garages.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the soldering iron in its coiled holder, the cleaning pads, and the main control panel on the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the soldering iron tip, the cleaning pads, and the main interface of the station.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the cable connection, the back of the base, and the length of the soldering iron cord.
description_view_3: Top-down view clearly showing the rotary control knob, labeled front panel, and both cleaning pads.
